MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Aug-29-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Evan R. Ettinghoff, Esq. MINNIS & SMALLETS LLP (415) 551-0885 aaron@minnisandsmallets.com
Attorneys for Plaintiff DENNIS CROTHERS
Ethan W. Chernin, eSQ., COZEN O'CONNOR 310.393.4000 echernin@cozen.com Attorney for Defendant
